The ASC claim lines are identified by the claim lines where the LINE_CMS_TYPE_SRVC_CD = “F.” The 
total ASC Primary Payer Payments are calculated as the sum of the LINE_BENE_PRMRY_PYR_PD_AMT. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: ASC_PRMRY_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: There are 11 cost/use categories from the carrier Part B and durable medical equipment (DME) data 
files — ambulatory surgery
